extension.description: Update Business Central XLF translations from .g.xlf — fast, git-diff friendly
command.merge.title: BC XLF: Update Translation from .g.xlf
command.showSummary.title: BC XLF: Show Last Update Summary
command.setDeepLApiKey.title: BC XLF: Set DeepL API Key
command.clearDeepLApiKey.title: BC XLF: Clear DeepL API Key
config.title: BC XLF Editor
config.defaultStrategy.description: Merge strategy when the source text changed
config.sortById.description: Sort trans-units by ID alphabetically (stable Git diffs)
config.preserveRemoved.description: Keep removed units as needs-review instead of deleting
config.openDiffAfterMerge.description: Open Git diff after update automatically
config.surgicalMerge.description: Write only changed trans-units (smaller Git diffs). Falls back to full file if a surgical write fails.
config.deeplUseFreeApi.description: Use DeepL api-free.deepl.com (Pro key uses api.deepl.com when off).
config.deeplTargetState.description: Target state set on the trans-unit after a DeepL translation.
config.applyEditsOnSaveOnly.description: In the BC XLF Editor, keep edits in the panel until you save (Ctrl+S); then write them to the XML buffer. When off, each edit updates the buffer immediately.
config.defaultStrategy.enum.keepTranslat: Keep translated target when source changed
config.defaultStrategy.enum.preferSource: Prefer new source text (mark for review)
config.defaultStrategy.enumDescription.k: Keep the existing translation when the source string changed.
config.defaultStrategy.enumDescription.p: Adopt the new source and mark the unit for review.
